# Midwess - High-Performance Software Development Studio

Midwess builds high-performance, secure software for engineering teams. A software studio specializing in modern, high-speed web applications.

## Products

### Bytover
High-speed, secure file sharing and localized data intelligence for the next generation of engineers. Skip the cloud. Stream entire folders instantly via ultra-fast P2P.

## Services

- Software development
- Web application development
- Technical consulting

- / - Home

- /products/bytover - Bytover Product

## Blog

Technical articles about software development, programming, and technology.

- React
- TypeScript
